# 🏨 Hotel Management System (Hotel Paradise)

## 📌 Project Overview

The **Hotel Management System** is a web-based mini project designed to simplify hotel booking and management operations. It provides users with an intuitive interface to explore rooms, make bookings, and view billing details.
This project focuses on frontend development using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, simulating real-world hotel booking functionality.

## ✨ Features

* 🏠 Home page with image slider and hotel details
* 🛏️ Room listing (Single, Double, Deluxe Suite)
* 📅 Booking system with form validation
* 🧾 Auto-generated bill calculation
* 📞 Contact page with hotel details
* 🎨 Responsive and attractive UI design


## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
* Storage: Browser LocalStorage
* Design: Responsive UI with modern styling



## 📂 Project Structure

* `index.html` – Home page with slider 
* `rooms.html` – Room details page 
* `booking.html` – Booking form 
* `bill.html` – Generated bill page 
* `contact.html` – Contact details 
* `style.css` – Styling file 



## ⚙️ How It Works

1. User selects room and fills booking form
2. Data is stored in browser (LocalStorage)
3. User is redirected to bill page
4. Total amount is calculated dynamically based on:

   * Room type
   * Number of nights



## ▶️ How to Run

1. Download or clone the repository
2. Open `index.html` in any browser
3. Navigate through pages and test booking



## 📊 Key Functionalities

* Form validation (email, Aadhar, dates)
* Dynamic bill generation using JavaScript
* Smooth UI navigation between pages
* Image slider for better user experience



## 🚀 Future Enhancements

* Backend integration (Django / Node.js)
* Database storage (MySQL / MongoDB)
* Online payment gateway
* Admin dashboard for hotel management
